title: Persea shweliensis
taxonomy: Persea shweliensis is a species of laurel, classified under the family Lauraceae. It belongs to the genus Persea, which comprises several species of evergreen trees and shrubs native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Persea shweliensis is also reflected in its botanical name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus. As a member of the Lauraceae family, Persea shweliensis is closely related to other species in this family, such as the bay laurel and the avocado tree. The classification of Persea shweliensis is an essential tool for botanists and researchers studying this species and its ecological role in its native habitat.
